display.purpose: Hero headline only; Fraunces, italic gold for the emotional beat.

label.purpose: Lowercase worded label + gold ordinal; the narrative-arc cadence.

shadows.name: gold-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Warm bloom on ghost-button hover. State-only.

shadows.name: featured-lift
shadows.purpose: Sets the single featured pricing tier above its neighbors (paired with translateY(-12px)).

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Transform-only entrance slide (.reveal); 0.75s, transform only so content is never hidden.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default 0.2s easing for button color/border state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Flat warm-gold CTA, near-black text, fully pill. No glow at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.75rem; padding-inline: 1.75rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #F0B35A; color: #1B1712; font-family: var(--font-body, system-ui, sans-serif); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #FFD083; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #E6A647; transform: scale(0.985); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(240,179,90,0.6); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent with a warm hairline that warms to gold and blooms on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.75rem; padding-inline: 1.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: #F6EFDF; border: 1px solid rgba(232,224,200,0.24); font-family: var(--font-body, system-ui, sans-serif); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(240,179,90,0.55); background: rgba(240,179,90,0.06); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -14px rgba(240,179,90,0.45); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(240,179,90,0.6); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The narrative-arc cadence: gold Fraunces ordinal + gold→transparent hairline + lowercase untracked label. Numbers run only on the capability arc.
components.html: 04while you sleep
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin: 0; line-height: 1; color: #EEE8DA; } .ds-sl-ordinal { font-family: var(--font-display, Georgia, serif); font-size: 1.1rem; color: #F0B35A; } .ds-sl-rule { width: 28px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #F0B35A, transparent); } .ds-sl-text { font-family: var(--font-body, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.005em; }

components.name: Featured Pricing Tier
components.description: The only framed pricing card (Pro). Gold hairline, 6% gold tint, lifted, gold price. No 'Most Popular' pill.
components.html:
pro
$30$20/mo
launch price
components.css: .ds-tier { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; width: 260px; padding: 34px 26px 30px; border: 1px solid rgba(240,179,90,0.55); border-radius: 20px; background: rgba(240,179,90,0.06); box-shadow: 0 40px 90px -55px rgba(240,179,90,0.85); font-family: var(--font-body, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-tier-name { font-size: 15px; color: #EEE8DA; } .ds-tier-price { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; margin-top: 14px; } .ds-tier-was { color: #C4C7BD; text-decoration: line-through; } .ds-tier-amt { font-family: var(--font-display, Georgia, serif); font-size: 3.2rem; line-height: 1; color: #F0B35A; } .ds-tier-suffix { font-size: 1rem; color: #CED0C5; } .ds-tier-launch { margin-top: 6px; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #F0B35A; }

components.name: Jobs Roster Row
components.description: One job in the 'while you sleep' roster — status dot, Fraunces name, description, trigger pill, activity.
components.html:
Prospect outreachresearch & write to fresh prospects every night
nightlyawaiting you
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 11px 16px; background: #2C261D; border-radius: 12px; font-family: var(--font-body, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-dot { flex-shrink: 0; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: #F0B35A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(217,185,120,0.2); } .ds-main { flex: 1; min-width: 0; display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 10px; } .ds-name { font-family: var(--font-display, Georgia, serif); font-size: 15px; color: #F6EFDF; } .ds-desc { font-size: 12.5px; color: #CED0C5; } .ds-trigger { display: inline-flex; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; background: #342D23; border: 1px solid rgba(232,224,200,0.14); font-size: 11px; color: #CED0C5; } .ds-activity { font-size: 12px; color: #F0B35A; }

narrative.overview: Sirius is frontier AI shown unhurried. The whole surface sits on a warm near-black lit by a single warm gold and a single live cyan — the palette of a powerful instrument idling in a dark room, not a launch countdown. Ambition is real but carried by craft and restraint, not volume: one living orb, one deliberate reveal, generous quiet around editorial type. The feeling is calm conviction — something powerful is already working for you — never breathless hype. It rejects both the busy automation-tool look (DAGs, node graphs, run logs) and the crypto/AI-hype look (neon, synthwave, edgy-dark theatrics).
keyCharacteristics: Warm near-black canvas; one gold + one cyan do all the talking.
Editorial serif display (Fraunces) against clean sans body (Geist).
Flat and tonal — depth from surface tints and hairlines, not shadows.
Motion is signature but gentle; reveals never hide content.
Outcome over machinery; the deliverable is always the hero.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Gold and cyan are the only chromatic colors. Everything else is the warm neutral ramp (outside semantic success/warning/danger).

rules.name: The Cyan-Is-Alive Rule
rules.body: Cyan is reserved for things that are living or working — the orb, the 'you' core, 'running' states. Never decoration; its scarcity makes the orb read as alive.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: The gold accent stays sparse — a CTA, an ordinal, one framed tier. When everything is gold, nothing is.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Label Rule
rules.body: Section labels are lowercase, untracked, paired with a gold ordinal. Tracked uppercase kickers are forbidden — the AI-grammar tell this system retired.

rules.name: The Italic-Is-Emotion Rule
rules.body: Fraunces italic (in gold) is reserved for the emotional beat. Don't italicize for decoration.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Any shadow is a response to state or hierarchy and is always a soft gold/black bloom — never a gray drop shadow on a rounded rectangle.

dos: Do lead with the outcome, not the machinery — the finished deliverable and the time it saved. A busy founder should feel the value in 3 seconds.
Do speak the user's language (deals, clients, 'while you sleep') — never 'workflow orchestration' or 'agent steps.'
Do keep gold and cyan sparse and meaningful; carry warmth through type, the orb, and copy.
Do use full hairline borders, background tints, leading ordinals, or nothing to separate content.
Do keep reveals transform-only (slide, never opacity-gated) so content is always visible.
Do hold WCAG AA — body text >=4.5:1; watch Ink Tertiary/Quaternary on raised surfaces.
donts: Don't look like a busy automation tool (Zapier / n8n): no pipeline DAGs, node graphs, step types, or run logs as the hero.
Don't look like crypto / AI hype: no neon glow, synthwave gradients, 'revolutionary,' edgy-dark theatrics.
Don't use generic SaaS-template grammar: no gradient-blob heroes, identical feature-card grids, the hero-metric template, or a 'Most Popular' pricing pill.
Don't put a tracked uppercase eyebrow above every section. Use the lowercase numbered-arc label cadence.
Don't use a colored side-stripe (border-left > 1px) on any card or callout.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism-by-default, or gray drop shadows on rounded rectangles.
Don't show what we are (the machinery) instead of what it does for you.
